name: dply
description: No auth. No config. Just deploy.

scripts.build: bun run build:cli && bun run build:site && bun run build:release
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/main.ts --target=node --outfile dist/dply && chmod +x dist/dply
scripts.build:release: mkdir -p dist/release && cp dist/dply dist/release/dply && chmod +x dist/release/dply
scripts.deploy:site: bun run build && npx --yes wrangler@latest deploy
scripts.smoke:dry: bun run src/main.ts --dry-run fixtures/single-html/index.html && bun run src/main.ts --dry-run fixtures/static-site && bun run src/main.ts --dry-run fixtures/vite-app
